# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-server
  namespace: frontend
spec:
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: http
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-server
  namespace: backend
spec:
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: http
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: database-server
  namespace: database
spec:
  port: 5432
  proxyProtocol: tcp
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-backend
  namespace: backend
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-server
    namespace: backend
  authorization:
    - identity:
        name: frontend-service-account
        namespace: frontend
      port: 8080
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-to-database
  namespace: database
spec:
  server:
    name: database-server
    namespace: database
  authorization:
    - identity:
        name: backend-service-account
        namespace: backend
      port: 5432
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-backend-port
  namespace: backend
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-server
    namespace: backend
  authorization:
    - port: 8080
      identity:
        name: frontend-service-account
        namespace: frontend
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-to-database-port
  namespace: database
spec:
  server:
    name: database-server
    namespace: database
  authorization:
    - port: 5432
      identity:
        name: backend-service-account
        namespace: backend
---
